name: GOLFTEC Folsom
about: GOLFTEC Folsom is a golf training and club fitting facility that utilizes advanced technology to provide personalized instruction and equipment optimization. The center focuses on data-driven improvement through motion analysis, video feedback, and launch monitor technology. Services include private lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships with access to training bays equipped with high-tech simulators and monitoring equipment. The environment is designed for serious golfers looking for structured improvement programs and custom club solutions.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION swing tracking technology
Comprehensive club fitting services with launch monitors and shaft optimization
Access to training bays with video feedback and launch monitor data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, but you can bring your own clubs for lessons and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator time isn't specified, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on the package chosen.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior programs and is designed to accommodate younger golfers with age-appropriate instruction and equipment.
